# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template to create an EC2 Security Group for SSH, HTTP, and HTTPS access.

Resources:
  WebServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH, HTTP, and HTTPS access from anywhere
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebServerAccessSG
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Development

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: The ID of the newly created Security Group.
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerSecurityGroup.GroupId
    Export:
      Name: WebServerSecurityGroupId
